summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Espace Maxo restaurant & VR gaming app with new admin dashboard, WhatsApp integration, and menu updates. All 20 backend API tests passed (100% success rate). All frontend features working correctly including admin dashboard, menu combos with PROMO badges, and booking management.
passed_tests: Backend API connection and all CRUD operations (20/20 tests passed)
Menu shows 4 combos with correct pricing: Solo 3500F, 2P 6000F, 2P Premium 9000F, 4P 16000F
PROMO badges displayed for 3 combos with original pricing
Strikethrough prices shown for all discounted combos
Admin dashboard accessible at /admin with full functionality
Admin stats API (/api/admin/stats) returns correct totals and game type breakdown
Admin bookings API (/api/admin/bookings) with filtering by status
WhatsApp link generation and display for booking confirmations
Category filters and navigation working properly
